headline: Search and public-copy lock: simpler promise, crawl files, and stable mobile polish.
focus: Make Ryokoplan’s public promise clearer in search snippets and keep the v202 hotfix stable.
notes: Locked the public promise around understanding the city first, then building the trip.
Cleaned remaining confusing search/meta phrases such as city-first map and release/expansion language.
Added robots.txt and sitemap.xml for cleaner launch crawl readiness.
Preserved the v202 itinerary CTA and mobile alignment hotfix.
